subject: New Request: Backend Engineer – Java
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from FrostByte Games, a company in the gaming space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Java
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• BigQuery
• Kafka

Practical details:
• Start: 2022-05-11
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
